title: April 26
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|April|hide31=yes}}

'''April 26''' is the 116th day of the year (117th in leap years). There are 249 days remaining in the year.
</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1927|1927]] – [[Graham Ashley]] is born.
*[[1940s#1940|1940]] – [[Harry Fielder]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Andrew Secombe]] is born.
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Kerry Gammill]] is born.
*[[1950s#1956|1956]] – [[Koo Stark]] is born.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Giancarlo Esposito]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Debra Wilson]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Peder Pedersen]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Bronagh Gallagher]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 12|''Star Wars Weekly'' 12]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 149|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 149]] published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 17|''Star Wars'' (1998) 17]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 4|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 4]] published.
*2006 – ''[[Tag & Bink: Revenge of the Clone Menace]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]'' paperback published.
*2011 – [[Star Wars Insider 125|''Star Wars Insider'' 125]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[Darth Maul (2017) 3|''Darth Maul'' (2017) 3]] published.
*[[2019]] – "[[Leia and Han - The Han Rescue]]" airs on YouTube.
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: Darth Vader by Kieron Gillen & Salvador Larroca Omnibus]]'' second printing published.
*2022 – "[[Gamorrean (episode)|Gamorrean]]" and "[[Huttlet (episode)|Huttlet]]" premier on the [[StarWarsKids.com|Star Wars Kids]] YouTube channel.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures|''Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures Shorts'']] premiere on Disney+ and Disney Junior.
*2023 – [[Darth Vader – Black, White & Red 1|''Darth Vader – Black, White & Red'' 1]] published.
*2023 – ''[[The High Republic Adventures: Quest of the Jedi]]'' published.
<noinclude>
